configCostBreakdownSubtitle: This is the full cost basis the app will use for profit, pricing, and portfolio math.
configCostInputModeLabel: How do you want to enter your purchase cost?
configIncludePurchaseTaxLabel: Include purchase tax in cost basis
configMarketplaceFeeHelp: This profile explains the fees the app uses when it calculates your net revenue and target pricing.
configPurchaseValidationMessage: Add your total cost, the number of boxes you bought, and the number of items in each box to finish the baseline setup.
configSimpleModeHelp: Simple mode focuses on the minimum inputs you need to understand your cost basis and pricing.
configUpgradePriceCalculatorAction: Upgrade to unlock the price calculator
configUpgradeToSetTargetProfit: Upgrade to set a target profit
configUpgradeToUnlockExpertHelp: Upgrade to Expert when you are ready to fine-tune taxes, shipping, and fee details.
priceCalculatorProNotice: Pro feature. Upgrade to apply calculated prices.
priceCalculatorRoundHint: All prices will be rounded to the nearest dollar.
